cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to work through this problem step by step. So, there are five dancers mentioned: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each of them starts with a partner: Alice with Lola, Bob with Izzi, Claire with Sam, Dave with Patrick, and Eve with Karl. The question is about tracking who Claire ends up with after a series of partner swaps. The answer choices are Lola, Izzi, Sam, Patrick, or Karl. First, I need to list out the initial pairings clearly. Third switch: Bob and Claire switch partners. 4. Fourth switch: Eve and Bob switch partners. 5. Final switch: Dave and Claire switch partners. So, I need to perform each of these switches in order and see who Claire ends up with at the end. Let me start by tracking each dancer's partner after each switch. Starting with the initial pairings: - Alice: Lola - Bob: Izzi - Claire: Sam - Dave: Patrick - Eve: Karl First switch: Claire and Bob switch partners. So, Claire's original partner is Sam, and Bob's original partner is Izzi. After they switch, Claire will have Bob's original partner (Izzi), and Bob will have Claire's original partner (Sam). So after the first switch: - Alice: Lola - Bob: Sam - Claire: Izzi - Dave: Patrick - Eve: Karl Let me check that again. Yes, Claire (originally with Sam) now has Izzi, and Bob (originally with Izzi) now has Sam. So that seems correct. Second switch: Claire and Alice switch partners. Now, Claire is with Izzi, and Alice is with Lola. When they switch partners, Claire will get Alice's partner (Lola), and Alice will get Claire's partner (Izzi). So after the second switch: - Alice: Izzi - Bob: Sam - Claire: Lola - Dave: Patrick - Eve: Karl Third switch: Bob and Claire switch partners. Bob is currently with Sam, and Claire is currently with Lola. After switching partners, Bob will get Claire's partner (Lola), and Claire will get Bob's partner (Sam). So after the third switch: - Alice: Izzi - Bob: Lola - Claire: Sam - Dave: Patrick - Eve: Karl Fourth switch: Eve and Bob switch partners. Eve is currently with Karl, and Bob is currently with Lola. After switching partners, Eve will get Bob's partner (Lola), and Bob will get Eve's partner (Karl). So after the fourth switch: - Alice: Izzi - Bob: Karl - Claire: Sam - Dave: Patrick - Eve: Lola Fifth switch: Dave and Claire switch partners. Dave is currently with Patrick, and Claire is currently with Sam. After switching partners, Dave will get Claire's partner (Sam), and Claire will get Dave's partner (Patrick). So after the fifth switch: - Alice: Izzi - Bob: Karl - Claire: Patrick - Dave: Sam - Eve: Lola Therefore, at the end of the dance, Claire is dancing with Patrick. Let me check the options again. Options: (A) Lola (B) Izzi (C) Sam (D) Patrick (E) Karl So, the answer would be (D) Patrick. Let me just go through the steps again to make sure I didn't make a mistake.
